# GYEON - Q²M Bald Wipe Towel EVO

£5.00

### 40 x 40cm

Add To Cart

Added!

### 40 x 40cm

### The short fiber, edgeless Gyeon Q2M Bald Wipe EVO towel is a gentle yet very effective towel.

### The Gyeon Q2M Bald Wipe EVO is a tight, terry weave microfibre towel from Gyeon.

### This short fibre, edgeless towel is ideally suited to removing polish residue.

### It’s a dextrous, easy-to-handle towel that removes reside with ease and without leaving behind any further marks.

### The Gyeon Q2M Bald Wipe microfibre towel can also be used for interior details.

### Like the other microfibre towels in the Gyeon range, it’s laser cut so just smooth edges and less chance of damage.

### Size: 40cm x 40cm
